finding_results.notes: Varied the three doubled-perception beats so they no longer reuse a single raw-then-system scaffold: the wrist touch now takes the diagnostic layer as an after-image, the sex passage lets the bridge intrude mid-feel, and the handholding beat pushes the system track into background fussing plus visible micro-correction.
